subject: [PATCH v7 6/6] nfsd: export NFSv4 callback op stats via netlink

2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch adds the ability to export NFSv4 callback operation statistics via netlink. It introduces a new attribute called 'proc4cb-ops' which is nested under the existing 'server-stats' netlink dump. This allows for the reporting of NFSv4 backchannel operation counts, including CB_GETATTR, over netlink. The patch reuses the existing server-proc-entry (op/count) layout and adds a callback section that emits one entry per callback opcode from the per-netns callback counters. This enables nfsstat to report NFSv4 backchannel operation counts over netlink.
